items.name: Aayush Sharma
items.content: PawPal has been a lifesaver for my dog Rocky. The caregivers are professional and I love the live updates. Highly recommended for anyone in Kathmandu!

items.name: Sita Thapa
items.content: The best pet grooming service in Pokhara. Luna looked so happy and well-groomed. The price is worth the quality and care they provide.

items.name: Rajesh Khatri
items.content: Finding reliable pet boarding was always a struggle until I found PawPal. Now I can travel for work knowing my pets are in safe hands.

footer.description: Nepal's premier pet care platform. Built with love in Pokhara for pets and the people who love them.

sections.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
sections.content: By accessing PawPal (the "Platform"), you agree to abide by these Terms. This agreement is governed by the Electronic Transactions Act, 2063 of Nepal. If you do not agree, please discontinue use immediately.

sections.title: 2. Nature of Service
sections.content: PawPal is a technology platform connecting Pet Parents with Caregivers. PawPal does not provide pet care services directly and is not a party to the independent agreements formed between users.

sections.title: 3. User Responsibilities
sections.content: Users must provide accurate information. Caregivers represent that they have the legal right to work in Nepal and have no criminal records. Misrepresentation is a violation of the Consumer Protection Act, 2075.

sections.title: 4. Liability Limitation
sections.content: To the maximum extent permitted under Nepal law, PawPal is not liable for direct or indirect damages resulting from user interactions. Users are encouraged to utilize our Safety Guarantee and verified booking system.

sections.title: 1. Data Collection
sections.content: We collect information essential for service delivery, including name, location, and pet details, in compliance with the Individual Privacy Act, 2075 of Nepal.

sections.title: 2. Data Usage
sections.content: Your data is used to facilitate bookings, process payments via approved gateway partners, and improve safety features like GPS tracking.

sections.title: 3. Information Sharing
sections.content: We do not sell your personal information. Data is shared with caregivers only upon a confirmed booking to facilitate the service.

sections.title: PawPal Safety Guarantee
sections.content: Every booking made through our platform is covered by our Rs 1,300,000 Safety Guarantee. This covers emergency veterinary care and property damage during the service period.

sections.title: Caregiver Vetting
sections.content: Our 7-step vetting process includes mandatory Citizenship Card verification, address verification by local authorities (Sifaris), and behavioral assessments.

sections.title: Incident Reporting
sections.content: In case of any mishap, users must report the incident within 24 hours through the app. Our Trust & Safety team operates 24/7 in Pokhara to mediate and resolve disputes.

about-us.title: About PawPal Nepal
about-us.subtitle: Connecting pet lovers across the Himalayas.

sections.title: Our Mission
sections.content: To provide the safest and most convenient pet care ecosystem in Nepal, empowering local caregivers and giving pet parents peace of mind.

sections.title: Our Story
sections.content: Founded by Samir Baral (CEO & Founder), PawPal started in Pokhara as a solution to the growing need for professional pet services across Nepal.

sections.title: Leadership
sections.content: Samir Baral serves as the CEO, Founder, and lead developer of the PawPal app and website, bringing a vision of technology-driven animal welfare to the heart of Nepal.

careers.title: Join the Pack
careers.subtitle: Work with a team that loves animals as much as you do.

sections.title: Why Work Here?
sections.content: We offer a flexible, mission-driven environment where your passion for pets and technology can merge.

sections.title: Current Openings
sections.content: We are currently looking for Community Managers and Support Specialists in Kathmandu and Pokhara.

petSitting.title: Professional Pet Sitting
petSitting.subtitle: Trusted in-home care for your furry family members while you're away.
petSitting.description: Our certified sitters provide personalized attention, feeding, and play in the comfort of your pet's own home.

benefits.description: Your pet stays in their own familiar environment, reducing stress and anxiety.

benefits.title: Verified Sitters
benefits.description: Every sitter is personally vetted and background-checked for your peace of mind.

benefits.title: Real-Time Updates
benefits.description: Receive photos and activity logs directly to your phone throughout the day.

dogWalking.title: Energetic Dog Walking

dogWalking.description: Reliable walkers who ensure your dog gets the exercise and mental stimulation they need.

benefits.title: Live GPS Tracking
benefits.description: Watch your dog's route in real-time and see exactly where they've explored.

benefits.title: Social Bonding
benefits.description: Walks provide crucial socialization and mental engagement for your pup.

benefits.title: Flexible Scheduling
benefits.description: Book a walk anytime that fits your busy workday or weekend plans.

petBoarding.title: Luxury Pet Boarding
